assumptions.attention: decode attention core; QK, AV, softmax; QKVO projections omitted as in Section 3.3 case-study note
assumptions.ffn: SwiGLU FFN flops from active routed experts plus shared expert when present
assumptions.routing: expected unique active experts under uniform top-k routing before route traces are available
assumptions.calibration: kernel/profile calibration is still required before final performance claims
